description.value: They can get anyone anything, as long as the price is right. Using their charm and skills of trade, they make the deals that keep the economy of the Dark Future flowing.
A long-distance sniper rifle. Holds 4 bullets in a magazine.
Range: 1 mile. In-ear.
Proprietary Militech ammunition that can only be loaded into a sniper rifle, designed to explode on impact. Function as armor-piercing rounds which deal an additional 3 damage.
Allows you to see detail up to 800m/yds. +1 to Single Shot/Aimed Shots for targets greater than 50m/yds.
An artificial eye. Choose Kiroshi Optics!
Provides a +1 to aimed shots.
A concealable, heavy pistol.
Basic ammo, nothing special.
Basic ammo, nothing special.
Light version of an Armorjack. No armor penalty.
Light version of an Armorjack for your head. No armor penalty.
AI Smartphone. +2 Library Search, +2 Wardrobe & Style depending on circumstance.
Desktop or laptop.
Range: 30m/yds. Not usable as weapon.
Bag.
+2 Personal Grooming when using Techhair as well. Changes hue.
+2 Grooming with Chemskin. Color changing hair.
Provides an LED showing vitals readouts. Can be linked to your agent.
The most technological and flashy clothing you can find in the Time of the Red.

information.notes:
Ghost fell into his career as an assassin. After moving to Night City in his late teens, he discovered that for all his talent at finding what was needed, there was never enough to go around - and that certain things were suddenly much easier to come by when their owners stopped breathing. He's quickly garnered a reputation for being an indiscriminate assassin with rates cheaper than what the corporate black ops teams (or the Iron Sights) charge.

Personally, Ghost lives for the mission, striving to improve himself and his equipment to a point that he can finally take suitable vengeance on the world that's spat on him since he was born. Whether that's a Silverhand style martyrdom or something yet grander remains to be seen, but one thing that's become clear to him is that he can't do it alone.

Difficulty: Easy. Requires some forethought and early arrival to set up on scenes, and good in-character communication to maximize effectiveness.

Style of Play: Out of combat, find the resources to get the job done and disregard all else. Seek out an isolated, far-off position to set up before combat, prioritize your key targets, and strike with precision. You know that meme, "Batman with prep time"? Like that.

Character Goals: Find a group of dependable people to manipulate towards the pursuit of your own goal of tearing up the world, whatever you decide that should look like. Continue honing your skills as a sharpshooter and covert agent.

Cyberware to Aspire To: Chipware socket + a skill shard of your choice, something to fill the remaining slots on your cybereye, and the capacity to effectively use a smart sniper/pistol.

In-Character Voice & Acting Inspiration: Captain Price, Call of Duty; Batman.

Local Expert: South Night City.

Techhair: Pitch black and perfectly formed curls.

Chemskin: Glowing silver facial inlays which match his "death hood" of a mask, providing the illusion that it's never removed.

All edgerunners included within NCG&C are wholly original, made to be played out of the box, and created using the "Complete Package" rules found in RED's Core Rulebook.

lifepath.culturalOrigin: North American/Southern California. Born in Los Angeles amid CW4.
lifepath.clothingStyle: Urban flash - the sleek, trim, high-tech outfit of a modern assassin for hire.
lifepath.affectations: His brother's watch - the one remnant of his family.
lifepath.valueMost: His reputation as a reliable marksman, fixer, and his mission-first attitude.
lifepath.valuedPossession: His reputation - failing that, you can't find a rifle like the one he uses just anywhere.
lifepath.familyBackground: Urban decay - dad was part of an LA boostergang, mom never graduated HS. Left for Night City once his family died.
lifepath.childhoodEnvironment: Street rat - never had a formal education, but understood damn well what people needed and how to make it happen.
lifepath.familyCrisis: Dad was a major figure in a losing gang war; when he died, so did Ghost's mother and brother as retribution. Ghost left before they could get him, too.
lifepath.lifeGoals: Shake the world so hard that it regrets creating him.
lifepath.enemies: A major head in the gang that killed his family, now in Night City with him. The two are aware of one another, and hate each other.
